top_signals.title: Oil Hits Session High on Report Iran Wants to Keep Its Uranium
top_signals.summary: Oil gained after a report that Iran’s Supreme Leader issued a directive to keep near-weapons-grade uranium domestically, a key sticking point in peace negotiatitons with the US.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Troilus gold assays underscore M&A potential, analysts say
top_signals.summary: Highlight assays at the West Rim zone include 19 metres grading 2.69 grams gold per tonne, 3.24 grams silver and 0.03% copper.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: The $6 billion expiration countdown: Traders pile into $82,000 bitcoin calls ahead of May 29 expiry
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Investec eyes City hiring spree in major move into UK private banking
top_signals.summary: Investec, the FTSE 250 financier, has unveiled plans to boost its UK private bank in a major strategic move that will include hiring new talent in the City. The expansion will boost its banking presence in the City, as it seeks out wealthy clients for what will become a ‘full service primary bank”. It has [...]

top_signals.title: Alkermes Showcases Data From Psychiatry Portfolio and Sleep Research into Real World Patient Experience at Spring 2026 Scientific Conferences
top_signals.summary: – Real-World Evidence of Positive Impact of LYBALVI® (olanzapine and samidorphan) on Treatment Patterns and Rates of Relapse Among Patients with Schizophrenia or Bipolar I Disorder, Including Young Adults – – APA Plenary Presentation Highlights Recent Clinical Data, Including Results for Negative Symptoms and Outcomes From Four Years of Treatment, and Real-World Evidence From Use of LYBALVI (olanzapine and samidorphan) in Clinical Practice –
